simple_types.name: Compression_Level

enumeration_literals.name: Level_1
enumeration_literals.description: uses Info-Zip's match finder for Deflate (32KB  sliding window), level 6

enumeration_literals.name: Level_2
enumeration_literals.description: uses Info-Zip's match finder for Deflate (32KB  sliding window), level 10

enumeration_literals.name: Level_3
enumeration_literals.description: uses LZMA SDK's BT4 match finder, dictionary's size specified in dictionary_size

subprograms.name: Encode

parameters.name: literal_context_bits
parameters.description: Bits of last byte are used.

parameters.name: uncompressed_size_info
parameters.description:
Optional extra header needed for .lzma files.
In LZMA.Decoding, type LZMA_Hints: has_size.
